title: Odyssey, Book 18: The Beggar's Fight
description: Book 18 of Homer's Odyssey: The Beggar's Fight.
introduction: Book 18 of the Odyssey: The Beggar's Fight. The Greek text follows the standard Homeric vulgate.

translation.text: The real beggar Irus challenged Odysseus to a fight. Odysseus knocked him out with a single blow. Penelope appeared before the suitors and extracted gifts from them. Odysseus watched and was pleased.
